title: Kopeshwar temple
tagline: Kopeshwar temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kopeshwar Temple is at Khidrapur, Kolhapur district, Maharashtra.
overview.description: Kopeshwar Temple is at Khidrapur, Kolhapur district, Maharashtra. It is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva. This temple is in Maharashtra It is also accessible from Sangli as well. It was built in the 12th century by Shilahara king Gandaraditya between 1109 and 1178 CE. It is to the east of Kolhapur, ancient & artistic on the bank of the Krishna river.

topPlaces.name: Kurundvad Senior
topPlaces.description: Kurundvad Senior, also spelt as 'Kurundwad', was one of two Maratha princely states during the British Raj: 'Kurundvad Junior' and Kurundvad Senior. The two states separated in 1854 and less than a century later, on 8 March 1948, both states acceded to the Indian Union.

topPlaces.name: Kurundvad Junior
topPlaces.description: Kurundvad Junior, also spelt as 'Kurundwad', was of two Maratha princely states during the British Raj: 'Kurundvad Senior' and Kurundvad Junior. The two states separated in 1854 and less than a century later, on 8 March 1948, both states acceded to the Indian Union.

topPlaces.name: Shedbal
topPlaces.description: Shedbal is a town in Kagwad, a taluk of Belagavi district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Narsobawadi
topPlaces.description: Nrusinhawadi commonly known as Narsobawadi or Narsobachi Wadi is a small town in Shirol Tahasil in Kolhapur district, Maharashtra. Narsobawadi gets its name from the presence of 'Shri Nrusinha Saraswati', the Purna Avatar of Lord Dattatreya.

topPlaces.name: Shirol
topPlaces.description: Shirol is a historic place. In a great war between Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj and the Mughal Empire, the Mughals were defeated and the heads of Mughal soldiers were hanged at the main gate of city.

topPlaces.name: Kurundwad
topPlaces.description: Kurundwad is a town on the banks of the Panchganga river, 55 km from Kolhapur (Kolhapur district) in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

items.note: Kurundvad Senior, also spelt as 'Kurundwad', was one of two Maratha princely states during the British Raj: 'Kurundvad Junior' and Kurundvad Senior. The two states separated in 1854 and less than a century later, on 8 March 1948, both states acceded to the Indian Union.

Kurundvad Junior, also spelt as 'Kurundwad', was of two Maratha princely states during the British Raj: 'Kurundvad Senior' and Kurundvad Junior. The two states separated in 1854 and less than a century later, on 8 March 1948, both states acceded to the Indian Union.
Shedbal is a town in Kagwad, a taluk of Belagavi district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

Nrusinhawadi commonly known as Narsobawadi or Narsobachi Wadi is a small town in Shirol Tahasil in Kolhapur district, Maharashtra. Narsobawadi gets its name from the presence of 'Shri Nrusinha Saraswati', the Purna Avatar of Lord Dattatreya.
Shirol is a historic place. In a great war between Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj and the Mughal Empire, the Mughals were defeated and the heads of Mughal soldiers were hanged at the main gate of city.
Kurundwad is a town on the banks of the Panchganga river, 55 km from Kolhapur (Kolhapur district) in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kopeshwar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kopeshwar temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kopeshwar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (42 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (158 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kopeshwar temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kopeshwar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kopeshwar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kopeshwar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kopeshwar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kurundvad Senior, Kurundvad Junior, Shedbal, Narsobawadi, Shirol.
